mapper.select: select datasource_key as `key`, host, port, username as user, password, database_name as `database` from dbhub_datasource_config order by id desc
select datasource_key as `key`, database_name as `database` from dbhub_datasource_config order by id desc
select count(1) from dbhub_datasource_config where datasource_key = #{key}
mapper.update: update dbhub_datasource_config set host = #{host}, port = #{port}, username = #{user}, password = #{password}, database_name = #{database}, updated_at = now() where datasource_key = #{key}
mapper.insert: insert into dbhub_datasource_config(datasource_key, host, port, username, password, database_name, created_at, updated_at) values (#{key}, #{host}, #{port}, #{user}, #{password}, #{database}, now(), now())
